message:
Add Manual Benchmark Trigger UI for workers dashboard

Implements the benchmark trigger UI (bead remote_compilation_helper-brm):

- Add useBenchmarkProgress hook: SSE-based progress tracking for benchmark
  lifecycle events (queued, started, progress, completed, failed)
- Add BenchmarkTriggerButton: Inline trigger button with compact progress display
- Add BenchmarkProgressModal: Detailed modal with phase-by-phase progress,
  score breakdown on completion, and retry on failure
- Add Dialog UI component using Radix Dialog primitives
- Integrate trigger button into WorkerCard with disable state for
  unreachable/draining/disabled workers

The UI connects to the /api/ws SSE endpoint with worker subscription filtering
and listens for benchmark events. Progress shows current phase (CPU, Memory,
Disk, Network, Compilation) with percentage and elapsed time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
